title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Flipkart Books

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Flipkart Books
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Flipkart Books in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
